# Quade

First mentioned: **3301-08-13**  
Last mentioned: **3301-09-29**  
Total mentions: **6**

## Related


## Biography

Commander Quade is a Federal pilot who participated in the United Offensive against the Kumo Crew in the Pegasi sector during August 3301. Quade signed his report from the front lines of the Pegasi Pirate War, documenting the Imperial rescue of marked slaves from Kumo Crew vessels and their relocation to safety via Sirius Corporation commanders.

Quade's dispatches highlighted the humanitarian dimension of the conflict, including the case of Aasha, a former Imperial slave and mechanical engineer who was rescued from stasis aboard a pirate vessel in Comanga. His reporting provided rare independent verification of the cooperation between Imperial and Federal forces during one of the largest anti-piracy campaigns of the early 34th century.
